title: THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN:

paragraphs.text: THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN:
Perfect health conditions
Continuous blessings unstoppable
You will be the head and not the big toe
There will be no devil in your life
You will be infallible
Before you open your mouth I will answer you
You will live to an old age
Your life will be stable
Your intelligence will exceed like no others
You will be promoted continuously every year both in the spiritual and in the physical realm.
You will be highly sought after.
You will eat the best of the land.
There is no sorrow in your life.
Your enemy will serve you.
You will have abundance, never suffer lack.
Your loved ones will not be deceived, for I will build a hedge over them.
Your salary will increase every year. During a recession, others will receive a pay cut, but yours will remain intact or untouched.
Less testing for you because you have honoured my commandments
Trouble free, stress free.
Life is a holiday during the preservation period, remain untouched.
Life is a continuous gift from us, every morning my mercy is new.
Instantaneous happenings, no holding back because Satan had no case against you.
Tears of joy await you daily. I saw a vision of JESUS giving you a bouquet of flowers before you get out of bed each day.
Everyone will call you the blessed ones.
You will have encounter with JESUS personally.
Your blessings will flow down to your children and your grandchildren.
You will have perfect vision, and you won't need glasses anymore.
Your youth will be restored.
Your grey hair will become black hair again, age reversal.
Your baldness will grow hair again; hormone reconstructed and being balanced again.
THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN
Your children will be given the best in everything. promised of a blessed life.
Your income will supersede among your peers.
Each will be given an inheritance from US, in different sizes.
All your diseases will be healed.
You don't operate by the law that govern this earth. you are now subject to a higher law, called the LAW OF THE SPIRIT.

Supernatural happenings will happen to you, because now you are tapping to a higher law of the universe. JESUS points towards the 50 POINTS IN YOUR BODY THAT CORRESPONDS TO THE 50 COSMOS/AGES, WHICH IS THE HIGHER LAW.
My vindication will be instantaneous.
A token of appreciation will be given to you each day, in one way or another by my angels(s).
You will have an inner knowing like me before things happen.
You will have very sharp discernment, just like me, as you are now a mini Elohim, being restored back to our image.
Things happen, as you command it to happen Rom 9:21-23with a sincere heart without ulterior motive
Many will be attracted to you in a good sense.
Shalom! my peace will dwell in you on a daily basis. therefore Satan is always under your feet.
Before you speak, words will be given to you, like a mini SHEKINAIH
Every day a prayer will be answered.
Before you ask, the answer will be given to you.
Holiday every year, free trip from God.
Your wealth will increase steeply as our steward.
Sharp business acumen, a shrewd businessman without harm, wiser than the children of this world.
A free trip to heaven.
